reviews.review_description: I just got the app as a recommendation from my vision therapist. Activities are pretty fun and challenge your vision. Definitely recommend for someone trying to level up their all around vision.
Have lazy eye and vision therapy helped and can help for better vision.

We’ve received our license of Vivid Vision through our developmental optometrist who believes that consistent use of the program will help my 5.5 year old son’s lack of stereoscopic vision.  He loves playing it, and it has drastically increased his willingness to participate in this and his more traditional forms of visual therapy.  We are only 3 days in so it remains to be seen the effects on his visual issues.  I’m optimistic!  

The interface and design are well thought out, the music is pleasant and he describes it as “peaceful”.  He asks me to do it first thing every morning.
